allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d[0], indent=2\)\); print\('---'\); print\('Total records:', len\(d\)\); print\('---'\); print\('Keys in record 0:', sorted\(d[0].keys\(\)\)\); print\('---'\); print\('Keys in record 7:', sorted\(d[7].keys\(\)\) if len\(d\) > 7 else 'N/A'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rec=data[0]; print\('=== RECORD 0 ==='\); print\(json.dumps\(rec, indent=2\)\); print\('=== RECORD 1 ==='\); print\(json.dumps\(data[1], indent=2\)\); print\('=== RECORD 2 \(partial\) ==='\); print\(json.dumps\({k: data[2][k] for k in list\(data[2].keys\(\)\)[:20]}, indent=2\)\)")
